# resumeOnDidBecomeActive

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that indicates whether the view controller automatically resumes the rendering loop when the application becomes active.

## Declaration

```swift
var resumeOnDidBecomeActive: Bool { get set }
```

## Discussion

The default value is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true]. If your application sets this to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false], it must explicitly set the [doc://com.apple.glkit/documentation/GLKit/GLKViewController/isPaused] property to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false] when the application becomes active.

## Controlling Frame Updates

- **isPaused**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the rendering loop is paused.
- **pauseOnWillResignActive**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the view controller automatically pauses the rendering loop when the application resigns the active state.
